name: Giant Oven Pancake
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a 10-inch pie pan or cast iron skillet.
2. In a bowl, mix flour, milk, and eggs. Do not overbeat; leave the mixture lumpy.
3. Pour the batter onto the melted butter, sprinkling with nutmeg.
4. Bake at 425°F for 15 to 20 minutes.
5. Sprinkle with lemon juice and dust with powdered sugar.
6. Serve with preserves or marmalade. Splitting the batter into two halves and baking in metal pie plates works well, avoiding the need to cut it later. A squirt of fresh lemon juice and a dusting of powdered sugar add extra flavor, along with an abundance of apricot preserves on top for a fantastic breakfast experience.
